outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Prospects fade for imminent end to Iran war as attacks restart and Abraham Accords demand added
outlets.summary: Iran FM declares CENTCOM strikes 'gross ceasefire violation' and vows response. IRGC claims MQ-9 drone shot down — unconfirmed by US. Iran delegation stays in Doha despite threats. Trump's Abraham Accords demand complicates deal. Rubio: 'few more days.' Brent $97.80/bbl, Hormuz Blockade Day 86.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Deal or no deal? Trump's social media posts add confusion to Iran conflict after walkback
outlets.summary: Trump posted deal 'largely negotiated' then walked back the claim within 24 hours, saying it's 'not even fully negotiated yet.' Iranian state media dismissed it as bad faith. Doha talks continue. IDF expanded Lebanon ops north of Litani River, killing 31 on May 26. Khamenei breaks silence with Hajj message.

outlets.name: CBS News
outlets.headline: Live: Iran war — US peace talks and Strait of Hormuz deal 'still a work in progress'
outlets.summary: Iran delegation in Doha for Qatar-mediated talks. Araghchi: 'Iran never wanted nuclear weapons' but uranium is a deadlock 'postponed to later.' IDF strikes Tyre wounding 37 after Hezbollah drone attack.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Trump says US-Iran talks are 'proceeding nicely' despite fresh strikes on Iranian targets — Live Updates
outlets.summary: Trump Truth Social: negotiations 'proceeding nicely' and demands Muslim deal partners simultaneously sign Abraham Accords. Trump convenes rare Camp David Cabinet meeting Wednesday on Iran deal. Brent rebounds to $99.52. IDF crosses Yellow Line into Zawtar al-Sharqiya.

outlets.name: RedState
outlets.headline: Hegseth's West Point Speech: 'This Is the Way' — Army Hits 2026 Recruiting Goals Four Months Early
outlets.summary: Hegseth at West Point: 'Diversity is not our strength. Unity is our strength.' Army hit 2026 recruiting goals four months early. Speech praised by conservative media while Iran deal negotiations proceed.

outlets.name: The Hill
outlets.headline: Rubio warns of 'another way' if Iran talks fail — military option remains on the table
outlets.summary: Rubio in New Delhi issues the clearest US military threat since ceasefire. 'Another way' interpreted as resumed airstrikes. Republican hawks Wicker and Cruz remain opposed to any deal that defers nuclear issues.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war day 89: Khamenei breaks silence; Israel expands Lebanon ground ops; Trump walks back 'largely negotiated'
outlets.summary: Khamenei's Hajj message: 'US era is over, no US bases in region.' Iran Armed Forces: retaliation would be 'more severe than previous wars.' IDF expanded north of Litani River; 31 killed in Lebanon May 26 including 14 in Burj al-Shamali. Trump walked back 'largely negotiated' claim. Brent $99.18/bbl.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Iran FM Araghchi admits uranium 'deadlock' with US as Doha talks begin
outlets.summary: Araghchi: uranium issue 'postponed to later stages.' Trump ultimatum and Rubio threat frame the negotiations as binary. Brent crude fell to $100.21 on deal optimism, down from $103.54 Thursday.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Oil Nears $100 on Khamenei Threats as Iran-US Deal Timeline Slips
outlets.summary: Brent surged to $99.18/bbl (+3% May 26) after Khamenei's Hajj message and Iran retaliation threats. Trump walked back 'largely negotiated' claim. Hormuz Blockade Day 85; 10.8 mb/d blocked. IEA 53.3M bbl SPR tranche provides partial cushion. Deal scenario: Brent could fall to $82-90 range.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF expands ground operations north of Litani River; 31 killed in Lebanon on May 26; Hezbollah rockets north
outlets.summary: IDF crossed the Yellow Line, expanding north of the Litani River with additional battalion called up. 100+ Hezbollah sites struck overnight. 31 killed in Lebanon May 26: 14 in Burj al-Shamali, 12 in Mashghara. Hezbollah fired rockets at northern Israel overnight — no casualties. Lebanon total: 3,244+ killed.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Israel 'very unhappy' with emerging Iran deal — officials say Hormuz is Iran's new nuclear weapon
outlets.summary: A senior Israeli official: deal is 'bad because it signals Iran possesses a weapon no less effective than a nuclear one' — the Strait of Hormuz. Netanyahu relying on direct Trump calls rather than envoy Witkoff.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: 'Fake Info': Iran protests Austrian intel report accusing Tehran of pursuing atom bomb
outlets.summary: Iran's Foreign Ministry slammed Austria's DSN annual intelligence report as 'fake information' after it concluded Iran's nuclear weapons program is 'well-advanced' and missiles are 'ready to carry nuclear warheads.' Israeli officials note the Austrian assessment aligns with Israeli intelligence.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: If attacked, Iran's response will be 'more severe' than previous wars — IRGC claims US MQ-9 drone shot down
outlets.summary: Iran's IRGC Aerospace Force claims it shot down a US MQ-9 Reaper drone over Persian Gulf after CENTCOM strikes. Iran FM: US strikes constitute 'gross violation of ceasefire' and 'Iran will leave no act of aggression unanswered.' IRGC: 'right to retaliate is legitimate and definitive.' Iran delegation stays in Doha.

outlets.name: NCRI (National Council of Resistance of Iran)
outlets.headline: Iran News in Brief: Economy bleak, IMF projects 6.1% GDP shrinkage, 68.9% inflation in 2026
outlets.summary: Iranian government economists paint 'bleak picture.' IMF: GDP -6.1%, inflation 68.9%, food inflation 105%. Araghchi in Doha for deal talks while domestic economic crisis deepens.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: Iran delegation arrives Doha — Araghchi: 'Iran never wanted nuclear weapons'
outlets.summary: Iran's high-level Doha delegation: FM Araghchi, Speaker Ghalibaf, Central Bank Governor Hemmati. Araghchi admitted uranium 'deadlock' but declared 'Iran never wanted nuclear weapons.' Status: 'very far and very close' per Iranian FM spokesman.
